scripts.cdk:diff: npm run build:site && npm run cdk -- diff ActionLineageDnsStack ActionLineageSiteStack
scripts.cdk:diff:site: npm run build:site && npm run cdk -- diff ActionLineageSiteStack
scripts.deploy:site: npm run build:site && npm run cdk -- deploy ActionLineageSiteStack --exclusively --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:dns: npm run cdk -- deploy ActionLineageDnsStack --require-approval never
